title: TANGZU Wan'er S.G II Bass Version (Lion Edition)
description: A Community-Driven Evolution of a Modern Classic Born from extensive feedback within the audio enthusiast community, the TANGZU Wan'er S.G II Bass Version represents a refined evolution of an already celebrated single dynamic driver IEM. By carefully reworking the low-frequency tuning, this edition delivers deeper, more authoritative bass while preserving the natural tonality, balance, and musicality that define Tangzu's signature sound philosophy. This is not a redesign driven solely by engineering data-but a redefinition shaped by listeners. Single Dynamic Driver with Enhanced Bass Authority...

title: Kiwi Ears Cadenza II
description: Unmatched 10mm Titanium DD with KARS 2.0 for Audiophile-Level Sound With enhanced tonal balance, the Cadenza II delivers deep lows, vibrant mids, and detailed treble for a full-range, immersive listening experience. Its lightweight design, premium materials, and detachable cable system ensure durability, comfort, and versatile connectivity. Whether you're producing music, gaming, or simply enjoying your favorite tunes, the Cadenza II provides exceptional clarity, accuracy, and long-term listening comfort. Unmatched Bass Precision with KARS 2.0 The Cadenza II unveils the next generation of Kiwi...

title: DUNU Titan S
description: Cyberpunk Theme New Looks For the first time ever we have got a Cyberpunk Themed pair that looks simply spectacular in terms of build and design. Titan S revamps the classic Titan series of budget IEMs by DUNU in an all-new Avatar. Now listen to your favorite music with style with the techie Titan S. Newly-developed 11mm Dynamic Driver Complement your music with the best quality sound possible in the price segment with Titan S. DUNU has featured a newly-developed 11mm dynamic driver with the pair. This driver adopts a polycondensate LCP(Liquid Crystal Polymer) diaphragm that provides exception...

title: HIDIZS MP143 Salt
description: HIDIZS MP143 Salt: A Whale-Inspired, Ocean-Friendly IEM HIDIZS proudly introduces the MP143 Salt, an in-ear monitor inspired by the elegance of whales and crafted with eco-friendly, plastic-free packaging. Developed in partnership with Whale and Dolphin Conservation (WDC), this innovative product reflects HIDIZS's commitment to sustainability and ocean preservation through its "ocean-friendly packaging" concept. Featuring a large 14.3mm planar magnetic driver, the MP143 Salt delivers rich, clear, and detailed sound, all within a lightweight, whale-inspired design that merges superior audio qua...

title: HIDIZS MP145
description: Whale Tail & Rorqual Pleats Design Inspiration Hidizs is delighted to introduce its latest innovation, the Hidizs MP145, where immersive sound and customizable bliss converge in a pair of In-Ear Monitors (IEMs). It stands as the world's first professional-grade HiFi In-Ear Monitors that harmoniously blend oceanic whale conservation with exceptional industrial design. Experience the richness, outstanding clarity, and meticulous detail in every note, thanks to its ultra-large 14.5mm planar magnetic driver, and revel in the lightweight design inspired by the graceful whale. Fully Symmetrical Magn...

title: Kiwi Ears Quintet
description: 4 Driver Types, 5 Drivers per Side The Kiwi Ears Quintet utilizes 4 different types of drivers, consisting of 1 Diamond-Like Carbon (DLC) dynamic driver, 2 balanced armature (BA) drivers, 1 planar magnetic driver, and 1 piezoelectric (PZT) bone conductor. With a total of 5 drivers per each ear, the Quintet delivers extremely high-resolution audio comparable to professional studio monitors. A large 10mm DLC driver was selected as the sub-woofer due to DLC's high responsiveness and tensile strength, which pumps out impactful bass slams, but with fast decay speeds. 2 Knowles balanced armature dri...

title: SIMGOT SuperMix 5
description: Five-in-one Matrix Acoustic Architecture SuperMix 5 employs a luxurious five-driver configuration of 'dynamic driver x 1 + balanced armature x 2 + micro planar driver x 1 + bone conduction x 1'. This includes an 8mm DLC flexible surround dynamic driver, delivering robust and detailed bass. Paired with two large-volume balanced armature drivers for the midrange and a planar magnetic driver, it significantly enhances resolution and extension. A custom 10mm bone conduction driver, designed for mid-to-low frequency compensation, enhances bass texture and response speed. The synergistic operation o...

title: Kiwi Ears Orchestra II
description: Immersive, Transparent Audio with Custom-Tuned Drivers The Kiwi Ears Orchestra II is a perfect blend of cutting-edge design and exceptional sound quality, built for audiophiles who demand clarity and precision. Featuring 10 custom balanced armature drivers, this IEM ensures a transparent sound profile that faithfully reproduces every detail in your music. The custom acrylic housing minimizes distortion and resonance, allowing for a clear, balanced listening experience with deep bass, rich mids, and crisp, extended treble. Custom-Tuned Balanced Armature Drivers for Accurate Sound Reproduction T...

title: THIEAUDIO Hype 4 MKII
description: Completely Redesigned for Performance The HYPE 4 MKII is not just a retuning - it's a complete redesign from the ground up. Featuring brand new balanced armature drivers from Knowles, second generation IMPACT2 sub-woofer system, and a new engineering approach, the HYPE 4 MKII makes leaps in both tonal and technical performance. Gen 2 IMPACT2 The HYPE 4 MKII incorporated the latest generation of the IMPACT2 sub-woofer system, which is shared with the Monarch MKIV. Two 8mm composite diaphragm dynamic drivers encased in THIEAUDIO's proprietary pneumatic acoustic chamber pumps out tight, focused, ...

title: Softears RSV-MKII
description: A Classic, Reimagined, Fine-Tuned Energy Distribution RSV-MKII builds upon the acclaimed foundation of the original RSV without altering the driver configuration, instead refining sound through precise impedance adjustments across low, mid, and high frequencies. This optimization carefully redistributes energy, creating deeper and more powerful bass, improved accuracy and clarity in the midrange, and a smoother, more refined treble. It represents not just a simple refresh but a genuine upgrade to Softears' classic tuning. Upgraded Cross-Over Component Architecture The RSV-MKII adopts Softears'...

title: THIEAUDIO Monarch MKIV
description: Custom Tuning at Your Fingertips Switch between studio-neutral and basshead tunings whenever you want. For the first time in Thieaudio's Signature Series lineup, the Monarch MKIV (Mark Four) comes with an adjustable tuning switch. Extensive R&D has led up to a functional tuning switch that is stylish, easy to use without tools, and makes an extensive impact on the tuning. Users can switch between "STANDARD" and "RUMBLE" modes. RUMBLE adds an additional 3dB to the entire sub-bass shelf, increasing both the sub-bass and low-mid power. With RUMBLE, the overall tuning profile becomes thicker, warm...

title: TANGZU THE KING WUKONG
description: Precision Titanium CNC Machining Crafted from grade 4 titanium, the Wukong features advanced CNC-machined housing, internal acoustic ducts, and resonator chambers. Titanium ensures strength, corrosion resistance, lightweight wear, hypoallergenic comfort, and minimal vibration interference, preserving every nuance of your music. Power, Refinement, and Design Inspired by the Monkey King's legendary strength and grace, the sculpted titanium alloy shell balances raw power with precise artistry. Every curve and contour embodies resilience, mastery, and timeless elegance. Three-Driver Interconnectio...
